## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.11.8

### Cameras
- Fixes camera Motion events to follow the APK event/history model instead of synthetic binary motion state.
- Preserves live camera event timestamps as `eventTime` so Motion and AI event entities can update from the same event shape used by APK history records.
- Removes the old camera motion aliasing that created `isMoved` and `lastMotionTime` values that do not exist in the APK camera record model.

### Blueprints
- Updates the camera notification blueprint so it supports Motion event entities as well as AI Detection event entities.
- Keeps the blueprint default action as a standard Home Assistant notification.

### Validation
- Adds regression coverage for APK-shaped camera event timestamps.
- Adds regression coverage so camera event handling does not recreate synthetic motion state.
- Adds regression coverage for Motion support in the camera notification blueprint.
